title: Kindergarten Opens Enrolment for New Academic Year
summary: UCDP's Kindergarten Programme is welcoming a new cohort of children for the 2026 academic year.
content:
UCDP's Kindergarten Programme is welcoming a new cohort of children for the 2026 academic year.

The kindergarten provides free early childhood education to children from vulnerable families in the Uhuru Estate area and surrounding communities.

## Enrolment Information

Parents and guardians wishing to enrol their children can visit the UCDP offices during working hours. Enrolment is free of charge.

## About the Kindergarten

The UCDP Kindergarten has been running for many years, giving young children a strong foundation before primary school. The programme includes basic literacy, numeracy, social skills, and daily nutritious meals.
